title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: linux-firmware bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for linux-firmware is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The linux-firmware packages contain all of the firmware files that are required by various devices to operate.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update linux-firmware to latest upstream [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119890)

full_text:
An update for linux-firmware is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The linux-firmware packages contain all of the firmware files that are required by various devices to operate.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update linux-firmware to latest upstream [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119890)
